name: Wanderer
compose:
name: slashnode-wanderer
services:
  web:
    image: flomp/wanderer-web:v0.19.2
    container_name: wanderer-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      search:
        condition: service_started
      db:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      ORIGIN: http://${node.exports.host}:3111
      BODY_SIZE_LIMIT: Infinity
      PUBLIC_POCKETBASE_URL: http://wanderer-db:8090
      PUBLIC_DISABLE_SIGNUP: 'false'
      UPLOAD_FOLDER: /app/uploads
      UPLOAD_USER: admin
      UPLOAD_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      VALHALLA_URL: https://valhalla1.openstreetmap.de
      NOMINATIM_URL: https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org
      OVERPASS_API_URL: https://overpass-api.de
      MEILI_URL: http://wanderer-search:7700
      MEILI_MASTER_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - web_data-uploads:/app/uploads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3111:3000
  search:
    image: getmeili/meilisearch:v1.14.0
    container_name: wanderer-search
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS: 'true'
      MEILI_URL: http://wanderer-search:7700
      MEILI_MASTER_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - search_data-data.ms:/meili_data/data.ms
  db:
    image: flomp/wanderer-db:v0.19.2
    container_name: wanderer-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      search:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      POCKETBASE_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${secret.APP_WANDERER_ENCRYPTION_KEY}
      MEILI_URL: http://wanderer-search:7700
      MEILI_MASTER_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      ORIGIN: http://${node.exports.host}:3111
    volumes:
      - db_data-pb_data:/pb_data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-wanderer_web_data-uploads
  search_data-data.ms:
    name: slashnode-wanderer_search_data-data.ms
  db_data-pb_data:
    name: slashnode-wanderer_db_data-pb_data
